frozen_lens.direction: positive-minus-negative physical-outcome centroids over all 16 old development laws

guardrails: All 12 relations are disjoint from both earlier abstraction cohorts.
No second-fresh label selects a layer, position, direction, or threshold.
Matched subtraction cancels law wording, formula wording, material case, and answer order within each pair.
Numerical direction is identical across direct and inverse laws; only its physical interpretation changes.
Two algebraic surfaces, two cases, and two answer orders are retained per law.
All outputs, including failures, are retained.
primary_relational_endpoint: For every matched surface/case/answer-order cell, subtract the frozen physical score for numerical-down from numerical-up. Average contrasts within law. Positive predicts a direct law and negative predicts an inverse law.
